name: Rogue
summary: Skilled trickster, scout, and ambush specialist. Strikes hard when foes are caught off guard.

class_features.name: Sneak Attack +1d6
class_features.summary: +1d6 damage when target is denied Dex bonus to AC, or when flanking.

class_features.name: Trapfinding
class_features.summary: +1/2 level on Perception to find traps and on Disable Device. Can use Disable Device to disarm magical traps.
